'''Jalan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and associate of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arwen Cohl]]. He went with [[Arwen Cohl|Cohl]] to [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]], on a mission for the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]], to steal a shipment of [[Aurodium/Legends|aurodium]] ingots from the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Revenue]]''. Though the mission was successful, and the crew escaped through an arm pod, Jalan was hopelessly caught underneath a computer console when the pod they were in was shot down. Most other members of the crew had [[Death/Legends|died]]. Jalan chose to accept his fate, and died taking down some members of the [[Dorvalla Space Corps]] by self-destructing what remained of the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
